name: Path To Dragon
short_description: A casual and short 2D precision platformer, starring lil-dragon on a journey back to his family.
detailed_description:
Join lil-dragon on a journey to find his way back home in this 2D precision platformer. Expect a short-but-sweet, challenging, and most of all fun experience.

  • A single-player adventure featuring lil-dragon after being pushed down a cliff by a mischievous bunch of kid dragons.
  • Traverse through the ancient dragon cave and climb up the mountain to reach lil-dragon's home.
  • Unlock various skills as you progress through the cave and learn the ancient ways of the dragons.

You will be expected to jump, dash and flap your wings in order to reach otherwise inaccessible areas and avoid spikes and cliffs.
Use your dragonic fire to activate the various ancient dragon statues you will find along the way, each triggering a different kind of effect/challenge which will enable lil-dragon to move forward. Overcome the moving platforms, hovering mechanisms and false steps so you can go and see your mom and dad!

Also lil-dragon likes meat!

**If you are having issues playing with a controller, try disabling Steam Input and use only the game's built-in support**
